steps.title: Find b from 320% greater than 160
steps.content:
When a number is 320% greater than 160, we multiply by $1 + 3.2 = 4.2$:
$$b = 160 \times 4.2$$
Calculating: $160 \times 4.2 = 160 \times (4 + 0.2) = 640 + 32 = 672$

steps.title: Find a from 55% less than b
steps.content:
When a number is 55% less than 672, we multiply by $1 - 0.55 = 0.45$:
$$a = 672 \times 0.45$$
Calculating: $a = 302.4$, which as a fraction is $\frac{1512}{5}$
